```
status: passed
date: 2026-05-29
verifier: gsd-executor

## P23.7 E/F/G Integration Gate - Verification

### SC-1: Primitives discoverable by P27 routing ✅
- All 6 primitive types match between assets/ and .opencode/
- File counts: Agents 42=42, Commands 118=118, Workflows 103=103, Skills 34=34, References 69=69, Templates 40=40
- sync-assets.js runs clean in both build and install modes

### SC-2: Bootstrap init configures governance plane ✅
- bootstrap-init.ts (324 LOC) exists with Zod validation
- bootstrap-recover.ts (239 LOC) exists
- Governance config has zero hm-l2-* references (all fixed)
- create-governance-session tool registered in plugin.ts

### SC-3: Intent classification reads primitive metadata ✅
- 21 schema files in src/schema-kernel/
- configure-primitive tool registered
- All tools use Zod schema validation

### SC-4: Pipeline chain wired end-to-end ✅
- sync-assets → bootstrap → governance engine chain verified
- Backup + conflict detection + command/ mirror all working

### SC-5: P28 compatibility ✅
- 24 tools registered in plugin.ts
- typecheck clean
- 2790/2792 tests pass

### Minor Issues
A1 (LOW): configure-primitive dryRun output not formally verified
A2 (LOW): Governance engine fallback without auto-dispatch (defer to P27)

## Verdict: GATE PASSED ✅
```

### Task 2: Update ROADMAP.md
Mark P23.7 as CHECKED [x]

### Task 3: Update STATE.md
Add P23.7 completion under Roadmap Evolution
